buttons: Search modules, actions or press ⌘K ⌘ K
settings.label: developer keys loaded
settings.text: Toggle Sidebar Search modules, actions or press ⌘K ⌘ K V API Keys Securely manage keys to authenticate your external integrations. Generate New Key Keep your keys private API keys provide full access to your WhatsApp workspace. Never commit these keys to version control or share them in client-side code. If a key is compromised, revoke it immediately. Curl Example Send a message using your API key curl -X POST https://api.wapi.app/v1/messages \ -H "Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY" \ -H "Content-Type: application/json" \ -d '{ "to": "919876543210", "type": "text", "text": "Hello platform!" }' Documentation Explore our robust API reference Our API allow you to programmatically manage conversations, track delivery status, and automate customer engagement. API REFERENCE WEBHOOKS

settings.label: developer webhooks loaded
settings.text: Toggle Sidebar Search modules, actions or press ⌘K ⌘ K V OUTBOUND WEBHOOKS Configure endpoints to receive real-time notifications from our platform. ADD ENDPOINT SECURITY & SIGNING Verify the authenticity of incoming webhooks using our payload signing. All requests include an x-wapi-signature HMAC SHA256 header. VIEW SIGNING SECRET LIVE ENDPOINTS NO ACTIVE ENDPOINTS FOUND Add a new endpoint to begin receiving real-time platform events. CONFIGURE NOW PAYLOAD TESTER Verify your endpoint receives the correct structure. TARGET ENDPOINT EVENT TYPE Message Received Message Sent Message Delivered Message Read Message Failed Template Update Billing Event Payment Update Flow Submission All Events JSON SCHEMA PREVIEW { "type": "message", "appId": "...", "timestamp": 1782109048874, "version": "v3", "payload": { "id": "msg_12345", "text": "Hello World!" } } SEND TEST TRIGGER

Form Name Flow ID (optional) Description Flow Builder Switch between no-code visual editor and raw JSON. Visual Builder JSON Editor Visual Screen Builder Add screens and fields without writing flow JSON. Add Screen Preview Screen 1 Terminal Footer CTA Text Next Screen (Branching) Auto (next screen) Label Type Text Email Phone Number Textarea Select Placeholder Required Add Field LIVE PREVIEW Screen 1/1 Screen 1 Untitled Field Continue Flow Settings Configure metadata used for routing and reporting.
